deleteModal.title: Delete Sync Rule
deleteModal.description: Are you sure you want to delete sync rule "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.name: Name
form.pullHint: Pull resources from the remote registry into the local MatrixHub.
form.pushHint: Push resources from the local MatrixHub to the remote registry.
form.sourceRegistryHint: Create a registry first in Registry Management before selecting it here.
form.resourceFilterHint: Filters resources by name. Leave it empty or use "*" to match all resources; "qwen/**" only matches resources under "qwen". See the user guide for more patterns.
form.targetHint: Specify the target project. If left empty, resources are placed into a project with the same name as in the source registry.
form.bandwidthHint: Sets the maximum network bandwidth for this sync rule. The actual total bandwidth depends on concurrent runs. Enter -1 for unlimited bandwidth.
form.isOverwriteHint: If a resource with the same name already exists, controls whether the target resource should be overwritten.

validation.resourceTypesRequired: At least one resource type is required
